name: SQLite in-memory for local test speedup

description: SQLite in-memory for local tests - FOUND NOT POSSIBLE: schema has PostgreSQL-specific syntax (type casts ::text in indexes, enums, extensions) that SQLite cannot load. Reverted changes.

asi.rollback_reason: SQLite incompatible - schema uses PostgreSQL-specific syntax in filtered indexes (::text type casts), enums, and extensions. Cannot load schema in SQLite.
asi.next_action_hint: Alternative: Use PostgreSQL locally with optimizations (pg in memory/tmpfs, connection pooling), or focus on parallel test execution improvements. Could also explore schema modifications as separate effort.

name: Optimize PostgreSQL for faster local tests

description: Parallel tests with 3 processes: 32% speedup (18.1s vs 26.6s single process). Unix socket had no significant effect. Optimal parallelism is 3 processes for model specs.

asi.hypothesis: Parallel test execution with 3 processes provides best speedup for local tests
asi.findings: Unix socket provided no speedup. 3-process parallel is optimal, 4+ has overhead/contention.
asi.next_action_hint: Consider documenting this as recommended local test command: 'bundle exec parallel_rspec spec/ -n 3'

description: Parallel tests with 3 processes: 32% speedup (18.1s vs 26.6s). Full suite ~120s. Pre-existing failures in meeting_spec.rb (not caused by parallel).

asi.hypothesis: Parallel tests with 3 processes is optimal for local test speedup
asi.findings: Pre-existing failures in meeting_spec.rb are not caused by parallel. SQLite not possible due to pg-specific schema. Unix socket no speedup.
asi.next_action_hint: Recommend: 'bundle exec parallel_rspec spec/ -n 3' for local dev. Fix pre-existing failures separately.

description: Tested 5-6 processes: 5 processes 18.6s, 6 processes 18.7s - both same as 3 processes (18.1s). 3 processes remains optimal.

asi.hypothesis: 3 processes is optimal, more doesn't help
asi.findings: 5 and 6 processes same as 3. No benefit from more parallelism beyond 3.

description: Baseline with make test: 992 examples in 87.7s, 2 pre-existing failures in meeting_spec.rb

asi.findings: 2 pre-existing failures in meeting_spec.rb not related to test performance
asi.next_action_hint: Now testing /dev/shm tmpfs for PostgreSQL data directory
